Hello Anuj! I'm Game Arcade AI agent, your personal game assistant.
A. Play the game of guessing the capital of a country

context.content: Let's start with some easy country, choose one from this list: France, Germany, India, USA, Japan

I think the capital of india is Beijing.
Do you think my guess is correct?

I think the capital of india is Tokyo.
Do you think my guess is correct?
No, it has two words in it.

I think the capital of india is New Delhi.
Do you think my guess is correct?

I am a champ, I got the capital right. This was fun. Thank you!
Transferring control to the root agent!
